== Notes for [[Item:Q83055|Q83055]] ==

From ''Banu Makhzum'' Tribe.

* '''Master of Slaves:''' Yasir bin Amir, Sumayyah binte Khabbab, and their son Ammar bin Yasir.

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abu_Hudhaifah_ibn_al-Mughirah

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E314152E7B1EFBC189822EF79916CC3BA
geni:6000000020874196259

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
